attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
QUARTER                    ,  
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID            ,  
FISCAL_MONTH               ,  
SR_NUMBER                  ,  
SA_NUMBER                  ,  
WORK_THEATER               ,  
C3_CUST_THEATER            ,  
SRVC_LINE                  ,  
SRVC_OFFERING              ,  
SRVC_CATEGORY              ,  
C3_MARKET_SEGMENT          ,  
COUNTRY_CODE               ,  
HW_FAMILY,  
ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY,  
HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY ,  
0 TAC_BB_COST                ,  
SUM(TAC_OT_COST + TAC_BB_COST) TAC_OT_COST,  
SUM(TBO_COST),  
SUM(TSB_COST),
SUM(TAC_NON_OT_COST),
SR_TYPE,
CUSTOMER,
PROBLEM_CODE,
ENTRY_CHANNEL,
DELIVERY_CHANNEL,
ACOD,
INIT_SEVERITY,
TSRT_ID,
CASE_WEIGHT,
COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
TBC,
RMA_FLAG,
WARRANTY_PCT,
TAC_ALLOCATED_WRTY_PCT,
SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID,
VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,
SMART_ACCOUNT_ID                
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_EDW_TS_TAC_COGS
GROUP BY
QUARTER                    , 
FISCAL_MONTH_ID            , 
FISCAL_MONTH               , 
SR_NUMBER                  , 
SA_NUMBER                  , 
WORK_THEATER               , 
C3_CUST_THEATER            , 
SRVC_LINE                  , 
SRVC_OFFERING              , 
SRVC_CATEGORY              , 
C3_MARKET_SEGMENT          , 
COUNTRY_CODE               , 
HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY      , 
ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY         , 
HW_FAMILY,
SR_TYPE,
CUSTOMER,
PROBLEM_CODE,
ENTRY_CHANNEL,
DELIVERY_CHANNEL,
ACOD,
INIT_SEVERITY,
TSRT_ID,
CASE_WEIGHT,
COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
TBC,
RMA_FLAG,
WARRANTY_PCT,
TAC_ALLOCATED_WRTY_PCT,
SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID,
VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,
SMART_ACCOUNT_ID

SELECT
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,TAC.SR_NUMBER,TAC.WORK_THEATER,TAC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL) + TAC_HDR.CCM_TAC_KEY AS SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY, 
TAC.SR_NUMBER AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT,
RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS  BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,
TAC.WORK_THEATER AS BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD,
TAC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS  EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.WI_EDW_TS_TAC_COGS TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CNTL
ON TAC.FISCAL_MONTH=CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
 ON RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
(SELECT COALESCE( MAX(SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY),0) CCM_TAC_KEY FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST) TAC_HDR
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST SMTAC 
WHERE SMTAC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND SMTAC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
AND SMTAC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT = TAC.SR_NUMBER
AND SMTAC.BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD = TAC.WORK_THEATER
AND SMTAC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME=TAC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL)
